package rulecoverage

func NegativeSshHostKeyCallbackInsecure() string {
    ruleID := "ssh_host_key_callback_insecure"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`ssh.ClientConfig{HostKeyCallback: ssh.InsecureIgnoreHostKey()}` in non-test code"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
